testing_tools: Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP, Custom Scripts
test_scenarios: ["Attempt to bypass MFA using manipulated Cognito session tokens","Force browse Admin routes (e.g., /admin/payouts) as a Vendor Contact","Test for Horizontal Privilege Escalation (IDOR) by accessing another vendor's profile or proposals via API ID manipulation","Verify session termination on server-side (Cognito refresh token revocation) upon logout"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero unauthorized access to protected routes or resources; strict RBAC enforcement.
reporting_requirements: Immediate alert to SecOps; Blocking issue for release
trend_analysis: Track frequency of IDOR vulnerabilities per sprint

testing_tools: ClamAV (Integration), S3 Bucket Policies, OWASP ZAP
test_scenarios: ["Upload malicious files (e.g., malware, webshells) masquerading as .docx/.pdf SOWs","Attempt Path Traversal attacks via filenames in the SOW upload API","Upload 'Zip Bombs' to test DoS resilience of the AI Ingestion Worker","Verify presigned URL generation enforces strictly limited permissions and short expiration times"]
acceptance_criteria: Malicious files rejected immediately; No execution of uploaded content; S3 bucket remains private.
reporting_requirements: Audit log of blocked malicious uploads
trend_analysis: Monitor rate of rejected file types

test_scenarios: ["Replay Stripe Webhook events to test idempotency and prevent duplicate ledger entries","Attempt to manipulate 'GrossAmount' or 'Currency' fields in Payout API calls","Test Race Conditions on Payout Approval endpoint (double-click submit)","Verify transaction rollback logic (Saga pattern) when Wise API fails after internal ledger deduction"]
acceptance_criteria: 100% Idempotency for webhooks; No double spending; Ledger consistency guaranteed.
trend_analysis: Zero tolerance for financial logic errors

test_scenarios: ["Verify AWS Comprehend correctly identifies and redacts names/emails from SOW text","Check application logs (CloudWatch) for accidental leakage of unencrypted PII","Verify 'Right to be Forgotten' execution removes PII but retains financial transaction records (Crypto-shredding check)","Inspect database backups to ensure encryption at rest is active"]
acceptance_criteria: No raw PII in logs; Redaction accuracy > 99%; Data erasure requests honor retention policies.
trend_analysis: Reduction in false negatives for PII detection

test_scenarios: ["Scan EKS clusters for privileged containers or root access","Verify Security Groups restrict RDS access solely to EKS worker nodes","Check for hardcoded secrets in container environment variables","Validate Terraform state files are encrypted and access-controlled"]
acceptance_criteria: Pass CIS Benchmarks Level 1; No critical CVEs in container images.
